Alexander Stangroom and to the playtesters whose efforts made this a better book. CoupleofKooks On the Cover Vecna weaves a ritual to remake the multiverse to his liking while Kas prepares to slay the lich in this cover by Kieran Yanner. On the Alt-Cover The Eye and Hand of Vecna portend terrible doom for existence while the runes on the Rod of Seven Parts might offer our heroes some help in this cover by Hydro74.
